raw_content:
{
  "data": {
    "extracted_information": "ipapi.co offers a powerful and simple REST API for IP address geolocation, providing detailed location information without requiring sign-up for basic lookups. It supports various data points, multiple output formats, and comprehensive features for both free and paid plans. The API is highlighted for its accuracy, scalability, and robust customer support, with explicit mentions of privacy and payment security measures. While specific methods for age verification and location-based compliance are not detailed, the API provides the necessary data points (country, region, postal, EU status, etc.) and general integration methods (cURL, various programming languages) to build such applications.",
    "specifications": {
      "data_points_available": [
        "IP Address",
        "City",
        "Region",
        "Country",
        "Postal Code",
        "European Union status (in_eu)",
        "Latitude / Longitude",
        "Time Zone (timezone, utc_offset)",
        "Calling Code (country_calling_code)",
        "Currency (currency, currency_name)",
        "Languages",
        "ASN (Autonomous System Number)",
        "Org (Organization)",
        "country_code",
        "country_code_iso3",
        "country_name",
        "country_capital",
        "country_tld",
        "continent_code"
      ],
      "api_formats": [
        "JSON",
        "JSONP",
        "XML",
        "CSV",
        "YAML"
      ],
      "ip_version_support": "IPv4, IPv6 (Flexible IPv4 / IPv6 support for Paid, Standard for Free)",
      "api_security": "HTTPS / SSL Secure API",
      "infrastructure": "Built on AWS, high availability and scalability",
      "database_updates": "Database updated daily"
    },
    "pricing": {
      "plans": [
        {
          "name": "Free Plan",
          "features": [
            "HTTPS / SSL Secure API",
            "Suitable for testing / development (not for production use)",
            "No support",
            "No usage alerts",
            "No usage monitoring",
            "Limited Bulk IP lookup",
            "Standard IPv4 / IPv6 support",
            "Standard Privacy (IP queries stored in logs)",
            "Up to 1000 IP lookups per day (approx. 30,000/month)"
          ],
          "restrictions": "System may use heuristics to further restrict free tier API calls under certain conditions."
        },
        {
          "name": "Paid Plan (Premium Features)",
          "features": [
            "HTTPS / SSL Secure API",
            "Production ready & scalable",
            "Seamless upgrades (no code changes)",
            "E-Mail support (Expert help with API usage, integration / issues)",
            "Usage alerts (E-Mail alerts before running out of quota)",
            "API to monitor usage (Transparently track usage & control costs)",
            "Bulk IP lookup (GUI tool for multiple IP addresses)",
            "Flexible IPv4 / IPv6 support (modern 'IPv4 and IPv6' or legacy 'IPv4 only')",
            "Enhanced Privacy (Contact to bypass IP query logging)"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "payment_methods": [
        "Credit Card",
        "Debit Card",
        "Paypal",
        "Apple Pay",
        "ACH",
        "Cheque",
        "Cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, Litecoin & other Altcoins)"
      ],
      "currency": "All prices in USD",
      "billing_options": "Monthly & annual billing options",
      "cancellation_policy": "Hassle free, no questions asked cancellation policy; subscription continues till end of billing cycle upon cancellation.",
      "ip_lookup_definition": "Finding the geographical location (or related information like currency, timezone etc.) of an IP address. Each conversion of IP address to location is counted as a lookup (repeat queries of the same IP address count as a separate lookup)."
    },
    "features": [
      "No sign-up required for free tier basic lookups",
      "REST API interface",
      "Comprehensive data points",
      "Multiple API response formats (JSON, JSONP, XML, CSV, YAML)",
      "IPv4 & IPv6 support",
      "HTTPS/SSL secure API",
      "Production-ready & scalable (Paid plans)",
      "E-mail support (Paid plans)",
      "Usage alerts & monitoring API (Paid plans)",
      "Bulk IP lookup tool (GUI)",
      "Flexible privacy options (logging bypass for Paid plans)",
      "High availability and scalability (AWS based)",
      "Daily database updates",
      "Competitive & transparent pricing",
      "Flexible payment options"
    ],
    "statistics": {
      "accuracy_claims": [
        "\"I tried other geolocation services but none are that **accurate** as @ipapi_co is.\"",
        "\"accuracy ranges from city to postal code level\""
      ],
      "uptime_monitoring": "Multiple independent services monitor API uptime & performance."
    },
    "temporal_info": {
      "database_update_frequency": "Daily"
    },
    "geographical_data": {},
    "references": [
      "Terms of Service (linked)",
      "Privacy Policy (linked)",
      "Customer testimonials from Twitter and direct feedback"
    ],
    "legal_compliance_considerations": {
      "privacy": {
        "enhanced_privacy": "Contact to bypass IP query logging (Paid plans)",
        "standard_privacy": "IP queries stored in logs (Free plans, data is still safe)",
        "general_commitment": "Your privacy & security is our top concern."
      },
      "payment_security": {
        "standard": "Secure, PCI compliant payment provider (Stripe)",
        "certification": "Stripe is certified as a PCI Level 1 Service Provider (most stringent level)."
      },
      "data_handling": "Company never views or stores any customer’s full credit or debit card details on their platform."
    },
    "integration_methods": {
      "general_api_access": "REST API via cURL commands or client libraries",
      "supported_languages": [
        "Ruby",
        "Python",
        "PHP",
        "JavaScript",
        "Java",
        "Node.js",
        "jQuery",
        "C#",
        "Go",
        "C",
        "C++"
      ],
      "api_authentication": "API key/authentication token as query string for paid plans",
      "use_cases_relevant_to_compliance": [
        "Automatically detect & display a user's IP / city / country / timezone.",
        "Customize content for a user's geographical location (e.g., news, weather, store locations, currency, flag).",
        "Automatically redirect visitors to region or country specific websites.",
        "Filter out bad bots & crawlers based on region / country."
      ],
      "age_verification_location_based_compliance_support": "The API provides precise geographical data (country, region, postal code, in_eu status, latitude/longitude, timezone) that can be utilized by developers to implement custom age verification logic or enforce location-based compliance rules within their applications, although specific pre-built solutions for these purposes are not detailed."
    }
  }
}
